title: herpolirion novae-zelandiae
intro: Herpolirion novae-zelandiae, also known as the New Zealand Herpolirion, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It is a type of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the group of bryophytes. The medicinal properties of Herpolirion novae-zelandiae include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
